properties.zone_status_reason: LASD 6/18 2:30PM: Due to operations related to yesterday's building fire, use caution when outdoors in the area of East Los Angeles. This also includes the area east of Boyle Heights. If sensitive to health issues, go indoors. Close all doors/windows and limit outside activities. Limit exposure to outdoor air. For emergencies call 911. Alertla.org.

properties.zone_status_reason:
Advisory - Control burn - Coyote Creek Parkway
Expect smoke in the area. Santa Clara County Parks is hosting live wildfire training at Coyote Creek Parkway on June 18 with support from the Santa Clara County Fire Department

The training is scheduled to take place between 8 a.m -3 p.m.

properties.zone_status_reason: 6.17 AlertRivCo: Shore Fire EVAC ORDER downgraded to EVAC WARNING, San Timoteo Cyn to Hwy 60, except for the Shore Fire perimeter, will remain an order. Residents may return but should be ready to evacuate if conditions change. Shelter Closed. If you need assistance, call 1-800-RED-CROSS.

LAFD: Shelter-in-Place Order due to smoke expected in the area at Boyle Heights. Get inside IMMEDIATELY and close all windows and doors. Turn off air  conditioning/heating. Bring all people and pets to an inside room until you receive more instructions. lafd.org/alerts
